params.name: ANS Synthesizer
params.source:
* Grandmaster Scrolls (0.78%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Wishing (0.08%)
* [[EDM Festival]] Sept. 29 - Oct. 12 2023
params.description: On Dec 16, 1958 AD, the world's first optical instrument was officially unveiled. The ANS Synthesizer is an invention by Russian engineer Evgeny Murzin. Its greatest function is to transform input images into various sounds, thereby breaking the limitations of performers and traditional instrumental techniques. It greatly expands the forms and ideas if music composition, laying the foundation for the future rise of electronic music.
